data.content: Needs changes: 1. The schema default enables scope refinement for every install (src/lib/schemas.ts:153-160). 2. Scope-refinement agent resolution falls back to the generic dispatch default instead of requiring explicit configuration (src/lib/settings.ts:529-533 and src/lib/settings.ts:598-615). Together with enqueue-on-create, this creates an unexpected automatic command-execution path.
